content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Closed the remaining create-time duplicate-bead gap for bead 9ni.5.7. `src/cli/project.rs::execute_create_from_bead` now preserves the active-lineage preflight first, then checks for an already-existing same-bead project before the generic `project_exists` path and before any `br` claim. That means a bead-backed project that already exists in `not_started` state is rejected with the targeted `AppError::DuplicateBeadProject` guidance even when the caller reuses the exact same `--project-id`, instead of surfacing a generic duplicate-project error or falling into operator-recovery handling. The final tree also keeps the run-start side aligned with create-time behavior for legacy active lineage rows with `run_id: null`: same-bead cross-project starts now continue to surface remediation-oriented repair guidance instead of silently auto-failing the legacy row and proceeding. Added deterministic CLI coverage for the same-project-id duplicate case and revalidated the active-lineage repair-path regressions so the new create-time check does not mask the existing missing/corrupt/not-started snapshot diagnostics.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Reviewed the current 9ni.5.7 hardening in `src/cli/project.rs` and `src/adapters/fs.rs` against the two pending amendments, confirming that the remaining functional gap was the create path still letting same-bead existing projects fall through to the generic duplicate-project branch when no active lineage row existed.
2. [Completed] Updated `execute_create_from_bead` so same-bead project detection still runs after the active-lineage preflight but before the generic `FsProjectStore.project_exists` check, and tightened `reject_existing_same_bead_project_creation` so an existing `not_started` bead-backed project returns `DuplicateBeadProject` even when the requested project id is the same existing project.
3. [Completed] Added deterministic CLI regression coverage for reusing the exact same project id against an existing not-started bead-backed project, and re-ran the missing/corrupt/not-started active-lineage regressions plus the legacy runless start-path tests to confirm create/start semantics stay aligned.
4. [Completed] Ran the full repository verification gates on the final tree, including formatting, clippy, the locked `test-stub` suite, and the authoritative `nix build` gate.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_rejects_existing_not_started_same_bead_project_before_br_claim` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_rejects_same_project_id_for_existing_not_started_bead_project` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_reports_missing_run_snapshot_for_active_lineage_entry` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_reports_corrupt_run_snapshot_for_active_lineage_entry` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub project_create_from_bead_reports_not_started_run_snapshot_as_repairable_lineage` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub record_task_run_start_reports_legacy_runless_active_same_bead_conflict` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub retry_start_on_same_bead_reports_legacy_runless_repair_hint` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` exited successfully.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` exited successfully.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` passed on the full tree.
- `nix build` passed on the final tree.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
